subcodes.first_line: O ye people of insight! Where are the days that have passed from your life, and where are those that have faded away? Seize ye this Day wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل العبر این ما عبر من ایامکم و این ما غبر ان اغتنموا هذا الیوم الذی فیه
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
